notes:
Connect an agent.

• Drive your Karma skills from Claude Desktop, Claude Code, Cursor, or any MCP client — list, create, edit, chain dependencies, and organize, all from your agent.
• Settings → connect an agent → 'Add to Claude Desktop' sets it up in one click. Fully self-contained — nothing else to install.
• It acts as you, on your own library; org standards stay read-only (edit via copy → propose).
